criteria.text: Calendar-capped month selection: tabs for months after the current calendar month excluded; current = latest remaining tab with data, prior = next with data; phantom future-month data never selected
App calculates, zero owner input: sums the selected month grid via the MAD-41 parser from the owner existing monthly tabs, no owner-maintained summary/named ranges
Empty current-month start handled: when the current month tab has no data yet, the latest past month with data is current; never an empty or future month
Timezone-correct month boundary: current month computed in the practice zone America/New_York (e.g. 2026-07-01T02:00Z is June in ET); proven by a DST/offset matrix test
DTO byte-compatible so MAD-43 Reports renders unchanged
HIPAA audit + PHI-safe logging: workbook read audited (item reference, no cell values); unmapped columns surfaced by reference only, never cell values or the raw URL
